- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: File created and maintained during setup.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Confirmed Next.js 14 + TypeScript + Tailwind + Vercel-focused voice agent MVP requirements.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Project scaffolded manually in current directory due package-name restrictions from folder naming.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented voice pipeline pages, components, API routes, memory manager, and deployment config.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions required by project setup metadata.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: `npm run lint` passed and `npm run build` passed.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Dev server task created and running at http://localhost:3000

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Dev server ready. Open http://localhost:3000 → Open Agent. Use VS Code debug configs (F5) or `npm run dev`.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README.md expanded with quick-start, architecture, debugging, troubleshooting, and architecture diagrams. .vscode/launch.json created for dev workflows.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
